instructions: Follow AGENTS.md. Run commands locally — no Sail/Docker (Decision 014). Read .ai/handoff.md first, then the .ai/memory.md section index and load only the relevant section. Domain rules: Equipment has no employee_id FK; AssignmentService is the sole write path for equipment assignments; Employee is canonical, User is auth-only with employees.user_id link (Decision 011). DB-agnostic: PostgreSQL + MySQL via Schema builder only (Decision 010).
